q: What is your favourite type of shoes?
examiner_note: Mô tả đôi giày yêu thích. Sử dụng 'versatile', 'casual', 'semi-formal', 'sneakers'.

band7.text: I’m a big fan of sneakers. They are incredibly versatile, comfortable, and come in so many different styles that you can easily find a pair for almost any casual or semi-formal look. I wear them almost every day.
band7.note: Trả lời trực tiếp và lý giải tốt (versatile, semi-formal).

band8.text: I’d have to say that classic leather loafers are my favorite. I appreciate their timeless appeal and the way they can effortlessly elevate a simple outfit. They strike the perfect balance between being polished and comfortable enough for all-day wear.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng hay (classic, timeless, effortlessly, elevate, polished).

band9.text: I’m particularly partial to high-quality athletic footwear, especially those designed for long-distance running. I find the engineering and the superior cushioning to be unparalleled. Beyond their functional benefits, I also enjoy the sleek, modern aesthetic that many contemporary brands offer.
band9.note: Sử dụng từ vựng ở mức độ cao (partial to, engineering, cushioning, unparalleled, sleek).

v.example: The right accessories can elevate any outfit.

similar_questions: Do you prefer boots or sandals?
Do you have a lot of shoes?
